comment: Black Hill Landscaping recently did some landscape design and install in the beds in our front yard. They first did a full check of our sprinkler system in order to insure that we had adequate watering coverage for the planned install. Next, Evelyn came and walked through the yard with us, section by section, in order to understand what we already had in place and what we needed/wanted. She was very personable and professional and listened to our ideas & concerns. She developed a lovely plan that only needed minor tweaking at installation. Denisse was our project manager and she was fantastic, as well! Very friendly and knowledgeable about plants, plant care, sprinkler systems and install issues. The crew was great and they are obviously experts at what they do. Evelyn & Denisse were easy to work with and responded quickly to any changes we wanted or concerns we had. Denisse provided us with a plan for the first few weeks and then suggestions for the ongoing maintenance of our landscaping, not just install and gone! They trimmed up our existing plants, fixed some stone work and even came up with a plan to use some extra stones to create a little flowerbed border without us having to ask. Black Hill’s communication and customer service is excellent. The cost is not cheap, but you are not getting cheap work. You are getting a high quality design & installation from experts. Several neighbors have already commented about how nice it looks.  You get what you pay for here. I will definitely be using Black Hill in the future and would recommend them without hesitation.
draft_response: Lori, that means a lot to us. We know there are plenty of landscaping companies to choose from in the Fort Worth area, and the fact that you chose Black Hill Landscaping is something we don't take lightly. Looking forward to working with you again.
